key.name: stop-timeout-seconds
key.summary: Timeout in seconds to wait for the recording process to stop and transcription to complete

key.name: output-method
key.summary: Output method for transcribed text (type, clipboard, or none)

key.name: inhibit-sleep
key.description: Prevent the system from automatically going to sleep while a recording session is active

key.name: decrease-speaker-volume
key.description: Percentage to decrease speaker output volume when recording (0=no change, 100=mute)

key.name: mode
key.description: batch: single-pass transcription; hybrid: streaming + batch; streaming: streaming only

key.name: streaming-provider
key.summary: Streaming provider for hybrid and streaming modes
key.description: Provider used for real-time streaming during recording in hybrid or streaming mode (deepgram or voxtral)

key.name: batch-provider
key.description: Provider used for final batch transcription in hybrid mode

key.name: audio-device
key.description: Index of the audio input device to use for recording. Empty string means use system default.

key.name: available-audio-devices
key.summary: Cached list of available audio devices
key.description: JSON array of available audio input devices, cached for preferences UI

key.name: refresh-audio-devices
key.description: Set to true to trigger a refresh of available audio devices
